tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection module

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.manure_stream(mocker: MockerFixture) → ManureStream
tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_total_volatile_solids(manure_stream: ManureStream) → None

Checks that the property method correctly calculated total_volatile_solids.

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_mass(manure_stream: ManureStream) → None

Checks that the property method correctly calculated mass.

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_clear_pen_manure_data(manure_stream: ManureStream) → None

Checks that the method correctly clears the pen manure data instance

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.manure_stream_1() → ManureStream
tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_add_manure_streams(manure_stream_1: ManureStream, other_stream: ManureStream, expected_error: Type[Exception] | None, expected_values: dict[str, float] | None) → None
tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_make_empty_manure_stream() → None

Tests that a new, empty ManureStream is created correctly.

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_manure_stream_type_members(enum_member: StreamType, expected_value: str, expected_name: str) → None

Test that enum members have the correct values and names.

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.pen_data_1() → PenManureData
tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.pen_data_2() → PenManureData
tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_pen_manure_data_init(stream_type: StreamType, animal_combination: AnimalCombination, expect_error: bool) → None

Test initialization of PenManureData with different stream types and animal combinations.

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_pen_manure_data_add_valid(pen_data_1: PenManureData, pen_data_2: PenManureData) → None

Test successful addition of two compatible PenManureData instances.

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_set_first_processor_updates_value(pen_data_1: PenManureData) → None

Test that set_first_processor correctly updates the attribute.

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_pen_manure_data_add_mismatched_first_processors(pen_data_1: PenManureData) → None

Test that combining PenManureData instances with different first processors raises an error.

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_pen_manure_data_add_invalid_stream_type(pen_data_1: PenManureData) → None

Test that adding PenManureData instances with a general stream type raises an error.

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.test_manure_stream_is_empty() → None

Test that ManureStream.is_empty() returns True for an empty stream.

tests.test_data_structures.test_animal_to_manure_connection.sample_manure_stream(pen_data_2: PenManureData) → ManureStream
